data.body:
[Double Drop Campaign Preview]

The amount of rewards dropped in Missions will be doubled.
Don't miss out on this chance!

🗓️Mission Normal x2: 1/8 (Mon) 7:00 PM – 1/15 (Mon) 6:59 PM (UTC)
🗓️Mission Hard x2: 1/12 (Fri) 7:00 PM – 1/17 (Wed) 6:59 PM (UTC)
